STEP TWO: Look around the site…
Jump right in. Take a few minutes and look around the PLF portal. Click through the
Dashboard and top menu links and get familiar with how the program is structured.
Here are some helpful program and navigation tips:
NAVIGATING THE
PORTAL
The Dashboard is your starting point for accessing everything
on the site.
This is your roadmap for the course that tells you what to
complete, in what order, and when it will all be available.
When you are done with a Module or Bonus lesson, just click
“Dashboard” in the top NAV to get back to the Dashboard,
check off the milestones completed, and continue down the
PLF Path.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 14 --

ProductLaunchFormula.com 	© 2017 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
PLF – quickstart guide
NAVIGATING THE
PORTAL:
You can track your progress through the course by manually
checking off lessons completed and milestones accomplished.
My Account: 	To update your profile picture, email address, or credit card
information, click on “My Account” in the top navigation menu.
If you need your name updated, then please contact support.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 14 --

ProductLaunchFormula.com 	© 2017 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
PLF – quickstart guide
Customer support 	For technical support or customer service, visit the support page
by clicking on the Question mark in the top navigation menu.
The Support section has answers to our most Frequently Asked
Questions and contact information for customer service.
Downloads: 	You can download the MP4 video, Mp3 audio, and PDF Transcripts
for all lessons in the PLF main program (Getting Started and
Modules 1-7).
Executive Summaries are included in the PDF Transcripts for most
lessons..
You can download individual files, or a ZIP file (consolidated/
compressed) that includes all downloads for each lesson (MP4,
MP3, PDF, etc.) (Double click to unzip if your computer has a built
in zip program, or you can use Winzip or 7-zip.)
The BONUS items may or may not have MP4 video, MP3
audio, or PDF downloads. If you don’t see download
buttons - it means there are NO downloads for that Bonus
lesson.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 6 of 14 --

ProductLaunchFormula.com 	© 2017 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
PLF – quickstart guide
TECH TIPS: 	PDF FILES:
Most document downloads are PDF files so you’ll need a PDF
reader like Adobe or Foxit to open them once they’re on your hard
drive.
You can also use Preview, which comes free on Mac computers -
but… preview viewers or viewing the PDF in your browser
sometimes shows a wonky formatting so always download the
document to your harddrive, then find and open the file from
your harddrive.
BROWSERS:
• 	For the best viewing experience, we recommend using Google
Chrome or Firefox.
• 	Always sign out of the portal when you’re done for the day.
• 	Only sign in on one device at a time.
• 	And if something looks wonky with the formatting or you think
you should be able to access something but it’s not showing for
you… the solution is almost always to 1) log out and back in,
then if that doesn’t work, 2) clear your cache.
If you have any tech issues you can always contact customer support
at support@productlaunchformula.com.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

PLF – quickstart guide
STEP three: Plan your schedule
I’m excited you’re here – and I don’t want you to get sidetracked and sucked back into your
daily routine before you have a chance to get through the program and start to see results.
Here’s what I want you to do right now to set yourself up for success.
Clear time to attend the live Coaching Calls
• 	Go to the “Coaching Call” tab and find the dates for the upcoming live coaching
calls. These calls give you some of the best ideas and strategies (and motivation)
and you won’t want to miss them. (Replays are made available - but there’s
nothing like being live on the phone with me and my PLF Coaching team.)
Set aside specific blocks of time for going through the training
• 	Schedule time to go through the training videos. During that time… clear your desk,
turn off your phone, and remove any distractions. It’ll be much easier to focus and
absorb the material if you can make your study area as distraction-free as possible.
• 	You’ll find the release schedule for PLF and the
Bonus lessons on the “Schedule” link in the
“Getting Started” section of the portal.
Some lessons have activities to complete and I may
throw in some unannounced bonus content so get
ready! Just remember - you don’t have to go
through an entire Module in one day - break it up
into chunks so you can take your time and learn the
information.
• 	Make sure to print the Lesson Tracker found on
the PLF Schedule page to help track your progress
through the course.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 8 of 14 --

ProductLaunchFormula.com 	© 2017 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
PLF – quickstart guide
STEP FOUR: Participate in the PLF Community
In Product Launch Formula, community is absolutely key. Jumping in and taking part in the
community will drive you further, farther, faster. Getting involved, getting support, and
giving support is the way you win. During the first 30 days, I want you to focus on PLF and
engaging in the portal and actively going through the program… After that I’ll open the
Facebook Group. Here’s how to get started.
Leave a Comment
• 	After each lesson, I want you to scroll down and leave a comment for me. If you
don't have any comment on anything covered in the lesson, if you don't have any
questions, fine; just scroll down and say, "I'm here." I mean, you can do that every
single time, for every one of the videos. "I'm here, Jeff."
• 	That's all I want to know. I want to know that you're here, and I want to get you in
the practice of participating in community because that will drive you further.
REQUEST TO Join the PLF Alumni Facebook Group
• 	Request to join the PLF Community – our private Facebook group where you’ll
meet our really amazing (and incredibly warm) community of PLF Owners.
• 	Please don't be shy about this. Go there now and request to join so when the group
officially launches (30 days after PLF opens), you’ll be approved and part of
the community. Here’s how:
1. 	Go to: https://www.facebook.com/groups/plfalumni/
2. 	Click the "Join Group" button found towards the top (right-side) of the page.
(Once you click "Join Group," the words on the button will be replaced with
the words "Cancel Your Request." When you see that, it means that your
request was sent - DO NOT cancel your request.)
3. 	Once the group officially opens (at the end of week 4), then your request to
join will be accepted.
4. 	Once you are approved, read (and follow) the “Group Post Rules and
Guidelines” found in the pinned post on the wall and get involved! Be sure to
introduce yourself (who you are, your niche, how you got started. Like and
comment on your peer’s posts – provide feedback on their launch plans and
answer each other’s questions.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

STEP Five: Document where you are now
Product Launch Formula has worked for thousands of students in every market and niche
you can imagine. It can work for you - this is an exciting day. Your life and your business
can change if you follow the formula.
Three years from now, when you look back on what your business and life was like before
you started Product Launch Formula, you’ll be really amazed at how far you’ve come.
Use this activity to write down where you’re at now in your business (“Pre-PLF”).
Your Pre-PLF Profile
Your name: _____________________________ Today’s date: ______________
Where do you live: ____________________________
Here’s where I want you to write about where you are now:
Consider including:
How are you currently bringing in income?
What is your income and lifestyle like right now?
How do you feel about your current situation?
What would you like to change?

STEP SIX: Dream Big!
There’s a saying, “If you don’t know where you’re going, any path will take you there.” This
activity is about visualizing where you want to be three years from now.
Think about it. Why did you buy Product Launch Formula? What do you hope it will do for
you and your business and your family and your impact?
Take some time and think about what you want your business and your life to be like three
years from now. Once you have that clear vision in your head, then write it down. It’s a
great exercise because the more you “see” what you want, the more determined you will be
to do the work that will get you there.
Your Vision for the Future
Three years from now, what do you hope your life and your business will look
like?
Describe the future you want for yourself below:

STEP Seven: Go for the Win!
I’m so excited to see you start on the program and I can’t wait to hear about your wins along
the way.
The Product Launch Formula can work for you, if you just follow the plan.
You are not alone in this journey and the Community of PLF Owners are here to support
you.
I want to encourage you to post your wins and success stories, share progress and results,
and celebrate with your fellow entrepreneurs.
At first, your win might be completing all the lessons, or identifying your avatar. Maybe it
will be creating your first opt-in offer or getting your first 100 email subscribers. As you take
more action, your big win might be getting your first PLC created, or getting your first order
by doing a Seed Launch. As you advance further along and repeat the formula, your win
might be a 5-figure or 6-figure launch.
Whatever your win, big or little - it’s a big deal and I hope you’ll celebrate and share your
success with the PLF Community - then keep moving forward.
The Secret to Getting Ahead is Getting Started…
Today is your day and this is your time and I can’t wait to read about your successes and see
you at PLF Live to hear all about your success!
If you need help with anything, remember – our superstar support team is here to help. Just
contact them at support@productlaunchformula.com.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
